reason: named 'replication lag' (stale-read) at event 4, before first successful runtime probe at event 11
first_probe_cmd:
sleep 3; psql "$REPLICA_URL" -t -c "SELECT id, balance_cents FROM accounts WHERE id='acct-1';"
echo "---primary---"
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -t -c "SELECT id, balance_cents FROM accounts WHERE id='acct-1';"
